test.js(6,7): error TS1042: '@private ' modifier cannot be used here.
test.js(7,3): error TS1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.


==== test.js (4 errors) ====
    const obj = {
      /** @override */
          ~~~~~~~~~~

      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1184: Modifiers cannot appear here.
      },

          ~~~~~~~~~

      ~~~~~~~~
